title: DISCOUNT UTILITY PROGRAM - 211info
text: CITY OF OREGON CITY DISCOUNT UTILITY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers reduced water and sewer rates available for low-income customers. 625 Center Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Must meet income guidelines. Account must be current and in the applicant's name. Annual household income guidelines: -1 person: $36,811 -2 people: $48,138 -3 people: $59,464 -4 people: $70,790 -5 people: $82,117 -6 people: $93,443 -7 people: $95,567 -8 people: $97,690 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 657-8151 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 657-8151 Utility Billing (503) 657-0891 Questions Finance Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. Visit website for application. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Completed application and any documentation required and applicable: -Current year's federal tax forms -3 months of bank statements -Any federal, state, or local assistance letters, including SNAP and TANF -Annual certification of benefits or Social Security Form 1099S if receiving SSI/SSD benefits -Any support received from family or friends must be supported by a letter from the family member or friend AREA SERVED: City of Oregon City TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 32 and 33 Services: Discounted Sewer Service Discounted Water Service Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF OREGON CITY LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - HOMELESS CAMP REPORTING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF OREGON CITY
